generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [

]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for depth perception"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraDataTransmitted

]

    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [

]

instance DepthCameraDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance LiDARObjectTracksDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw point cloud data from Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance DepthCameraData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth perception data from Intel Deepsense D435i"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time vehicle speed data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time steering angle data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance LiDARObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed object tracks from DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARObjectTracksDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "SQL database for storing vehicle state and object track data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted, SteeringAngleDataTransmitted, LiDARObjectTracksDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance DBSCANModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN-based point cloud clustering for object detection"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance ACCControlStrategyModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622-compliant ACC control strategy (performance class I)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for edge computing"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, VisualizationService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for inter-component communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService, VisualizationService, ReportGenerationService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for rapid prototyping"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance CPlusPlus : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for ROS2 node lifecycle management"
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for complex systems like point cloud clustering and tracking"
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time display, saving, and report generation of vehicle state"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnvironmentVisualizationInsight, VehicleStateSavingInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "ACC system processing in the cloud"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCProcessingInsight
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "UI-based ACC control"
    DTDFVocab:provides RemoteControlAction
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D visualization of environment and driving path"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnvironmentVisualizationInsight
]

instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Report generation for historical data analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataReportInsight
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of object tracks and driving path for driver trust"
]

instance ACCProcessingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "ACC system processing insights from cloud computation"
]

instance RemoteControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "UI-based remote control of ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EnvironmentVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D visualization of environment and driving path"
]

instance HistoricalDataReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Report generation for historical data analysis"
]

instance ACCDecisionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "ACC system adjusting speed based on lead vehicle distance to maintain safe following distance per ISO 15622 specifications"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor actuation converting desired speed to voltage commands"
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo actuation controlled by lower level chassis via ROS2 nodes"
]

instance PhysicalSystem : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    base:desc "1/10-scale autonomous vehicle retrofitted with NVIDIA Jetson NX, NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano, Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR, Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera, and Vedder Electronic Speed Controller, built on a Traxxas Slash 4x4 Premium vehicle chassis"
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment PhysicalTwinEntity
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Environment"
    base:contains HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera, VehicleSpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor, MotorActuator, SteeringServoActuator
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:DigitalTwin [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity implemented as ROS2 package"
    base:contains DBSCANModel, KalmanFilterModel, ACCControlStrategyModel, SQLDatabase
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "User Entity for UI-based control"
    base:contains RemoteManagementService, VisualizationService
]

instance CrossSystemEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Cross-System Entity for cloud communication"
    base:contains ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance VehicleStateSavingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Saving of vehicle state data for historical analysis"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Transmission of ACC control commands (desired speed adjustments, emergency braking, enable/disable) from the digital twin to the physical twin, converted to motor voltage commands and steering servo adjustments by the Actuation FE."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "End-to-end latency ≤100 ms between vehicle and DT entity, with clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms across all components to support real-time operation and event ordering as per 3GPP TS 22.185 requirements."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Distributed system with Physical Twin Entity (hosted on Jetson Orin Nano on-vehicle), Digital Twin Entity (cloud-based for computation offloading), User Entity (separate UI system), and Cross-System Entity (Data Translation FE), interconnected via ROS2 and Wi-Fi networks."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Primarily operates in the 'as operated' phase for real-time monitoring, optimization, and health management during vehicle operation, with potential use in design phase for cyber-physical experimentation as noted in industry surveys."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2-based intra-component communication with DDS middleware, Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication, Data Translation FE handling serialization, message alignment, and unit conversions, adhering to ≤100 ms latency and 100 ms clock sync requirements."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity hosted on NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano (on-vehicle), Digital Twin Entity and Data Storage in cloud environment, User Entity deployed on a separate UI system for remote access."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 Part 2 reference architecture for DT design, ISO 15622 for ACC control functionality, and 3GPP TS 22.185 for V2V communication latency requirements."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety-critical requirements include ≤100 ms latency and clock synchronization to prevent operational failures, but specific cybersecurity measures (e.g., encryption, authentication) are not detailed in the document."
]
